checks.name: catalog_promotes_pca
checks.detail: Desktop method catalog marks standalone PCA as validated.

checks.name: catalog_promotes_pls_inference
checks.detail: Bootstrap and Freedman-Lane permutation entries are validated for documented PLS inference scope.

checks.name: regression_status_is_setting_aware
checks.detail: Regression status is validated only for OLS and experimental for logistic/PROCESS.

checks.name: analysis_readiness_uses_effective_status
checks.detail: Run readiness uses setting-aware method status.

checks.name: topbar_uses_effective_status
checks.detail: Top bar method badge uses setting-aware method status.

checks.name: result_tables_promote_validated_batches_only
checks.detail: Export table status promotes first- and second-batch validated scopes while leaving logistic/PROCESS variants experimental.

checks.name: engine_warnings_do_not_overclaim_regression_nca
checks.detail: Newly generated run warnings keep logistic and PROCESS experimental while treating NCA as validated only for the documented v1.2.1 numeric scope.

checks.name: core_validation_does_not_warn_pca_experimental
checks.detail: Core registry treats PCA as validated and no longer emits a PCA experimental warning.

checks.name: compatibility_docs_match_promoted_scope
checks.detail: Compatibility matrix separates validated PCA/OLS from experimental logistic/PROCESS.

note: Validated product surfaces are constrained to the first and second promoted method batches; unpromoted methods remain experimental or watermarked.
